ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts measured */,
  "volts" REAL /* Volts measured */,
  "amps" REAL /* Amps measured */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power Factor (PF) measured */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the measurement */,
  "harmonics" REAL /* Harmonic distortion */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the measurement location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the measurement location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is installed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., meter, sensor) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state_region" TEXT /* State or region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device assigned */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "unassignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the unassignment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Additional metadata (e.g., mark) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device used */,
  "measurement_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
